what_it_does: This file is a channel-memory attachment record that links an attachment ID to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Target is a board:// URI pointing to item-79686491
conventions: board:// URI scheme for target reference
concerns: Contains only metadata; no human-readable title, description, or author
No context about why this board item is attached
No code symbols or content to interpret beyond the pointer
notes: A bare ledger pointer that ties a dragnet-development channel attachment to a specific board item at a known time.
questions: What does board item item-79686491 represent?
Who or what process added this record?
Is there a corresponding board item file or content?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment record matches what it does: it records a typed link to a board item.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to create a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item so the relationship can be retrieved or audited later.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme as a target reference is the most distinctive feature.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed pointer from the dragnet-development channel memory to a specific board item, supporting lookup and provenance without embedding the board content.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment metadata file in the dragnet-development channel that references board item item-79686491 via a board:// URI and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to persist a typed link between a channel attachment and a board item for later retrieval and audit.
